# Store Distribution Architecture: macOS Helper / Login Item

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/storedistributiondocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to architecture](../architecture.md)

| Channel | Runtime shape | Background rule | IPC/data root | Update |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `developer-id` | local-helper-broker | explicit-consent | unix-socket / user-application-support | self-managed |
| `mac-app-store` | sandboxed-login-item-helper | explicit-consent-and-store-review | unix-socket / app-group-or-sandbox-container | app-store-managed |

Common rules:

- Provider CLIs are not included in the helper bundle.
- Background helper consent is sourced from C11 ConsentLedger.
- Channel allowance is checked pre-runtime by C7 EvaluateStoreChannelPolicy.
- Mac App Store notes explain helper purpose, consent UX, sandbox use, and provider CLI non-bundling.
